title: Interest on this VC
description: A Culinary Guidebook with 28 recipes and typical and popular local dishes from the region of the Eastern Rhodopes. The book provides also information about the food products and organic farms where the ingredients can be bought. A list of places (BandB's, hotels, restaurants) where the dishes are offered to the guests is also included in the book.
